```{{python}}
#| label: {CONTEXT_LABEL}-header

from pdstools.utils import report_utils

try:
    header_tbl, overall_fig, predictor_figs = explanations.plot.plot_contributions_by_context(
        {CONTEXT_DICT},
        top_n = {TOP_N},
        top_k = {TOP_K},
        contribution_calculation="{CONTRIBUTION_TYPE}"
    )

    header_tbl.update_layout(title="", template="pega")
    header_tbl.show()
except Exception as e:
    report_utils.quarto_plot_exception("Context Header Table", e)
```

```{{python}}
#| label: {CONTEXT_LABEL}-overall

try:
    overall_fig.update_layout(title="", template="pega")
    overall_fig.show()
except Exception as e:
    report_utils.quarto_plot_exception("Context Overall Figure", e)
```

```{{python}}
#| label: {CONTEXT_LABEL}-predictors

try:
    for plot in predictor_figs:
        title = plot.layout['title']['text']
        plot.update_layout(template="pega")
        display(Markdown(f'### {{title}}'), plot)
except Exception as e:
    report_utils.quarto_plot_exception("Context Predictor Figures", e)
```
